fires.name: Almería Wildfire (Los Gallardos)
fires.summary: Wildfire in southern Spain near Los Gallardos, Almería leaves at least 13 dead including five believed to be British. Hundreds of firefighters battling the deadly wildfire. British couple rescued from ravine. Landscape completely charred with homes razed to the ground.

fires.name: Paris Region Wildfires
fires.summary: Wildfires of exceptional scale near Paris. First time firefighting planes sent up from southern France to tackle fires in Paris region. Wildfire may have been set deliberately according to minister.

fires.name: Pyrénées-Orientales Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people in Pyrénées-Orientales region. Tour de France organisers ban spectators from stage three.

fires.name: Bangkok Bar Fire
fires.summary: At least 28 killed, 25 critically injured in bar fire in Chatuchak district. Firefighters arrived to find patrons running through blasting flames to escape.

fires.name: Thessaloniki Wildfire
fires.summary: Deadly wildfire near Thessaloniki with more than 100 firefighters battling the blaze. At least two lives claimed.

fires.name: Colorado-Utah Border Wildfires
fires.summary: Three firefighters died battling huge wildfires on Colorado-Utah border. Multiple blazes raging across Utah and Colorado with both governors declaring states of emergency.

fires.name: Riverside County Wildfires
fires.summary: Wildfires in Riverside County covering over 2,000 acres with fires raging near passing vehicles.

fires.name: Florida and Georgia Wildfires
fires.summary: Hundreds of wildfires burning across Florida and Georgia. Officials cite dry conditions, high winds and drought as key factors making the fires difficult to control.

fires.name: Nebraska Panhandle Fires
fires.summary: Largest wildfire in Nebraska history, burning over 640,000 acres with 1 fatality. Nearly 800,000 acres consumed across multiple fires. Conditions beginning to ease. 15% contained.

fires.name: Colorado Wildfires (South of Colorado Springs)
fires.summary: Multiple active wildfires in Colorado including fire near Highway 115 with 7,385 acres burned and 0% containment. Evacuation orders lifted. Fire continues to spread rapidly.

fires.name: Belmore State Forest Wildfire
fires.summary: Large wildfire in Belmore State Forest, Clay County, Florida. Fire Rescue actively working on containment. Sheriff's Deputy died assisting with evacuations.

fires.name: Casper Area Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire near Casper, Wyoming prompting evacuations amid record-high temperatures. Natrona County breaks wildfire record.

fires.name: Sevier County Wildfire
fires.summary: 50-acre wildfire in Sevier County, Utah near Vernal, driven by winds, putting structures at risk.

fires.name: Cross Creek Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire in marshland near Cross Creek, Florida prompting family evacuations.

fires.name: Nacimiento Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire in New Mexico with firefighters actively engaged in containment efforts.

fires.name: Bastrop State Park Wildfire
fires.summary: 46-acre wildfire at Bastrop State Park, Texas. 95% contained. Evacuation orders lifted. Stirs trauma from 2011 fire.

fires.name: Mossy Pond Area Wildfire
fires.summary: 500-acre wildfire in Mossy Pond area displacing 43 people with 15 dwellings destroyed.

fires.name: Mitchell County Wildfire
fires.summary: 125-acre wildfire burning near Tennessee line in Mitchell County, North Carolina.

fires.name: Alabama/Georgia Regional Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire spanning approximately 117 acres across Alabama-Georgia region.

fires.name: US Wildfire Season 2026
fires.summary: Searing US heatwave raising concerns for wildfire season and water supply. Wildfires ripping through unusual parts of US. Federal officials monitoring recovery efforts.

fires.name: Rio Olympic Velodrome Fire
fires.summary: Fire damaged roof of Rio's Olympic velodrome. Around 80 firefighters and 20 fire trucks tackled the blaze. No injuries reported.

fires.name: Chiang Mai Air Pollution (Fire Season)
fires.summary: Peak fire season in Chiang Mai causing severe air pollution with city ranking among world's most polluted. Health impacts reported including nosebleeds in children.

fires.name: European Wildfire Preparedness
fires.summary: Europe dangerously unprepared for worsening wildfires according to recent report.

notes: Deduplicated Fraser Canyon wildfire: removed 2026-07-05 entry (older, no image) keeping 2026-07-08 with image
Updated Bangkok Bar Fire counts: changed from 27 killed, 22 injured to 28 killed, 25 injured per BBC article
Merged multiple Spain wildfire articles into single Almería entry with consolidated information
Preserved all 23 existing world fires as they remain Active
